calendar.matters: Verified Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate Distribution
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting, Report, Fees

Verified Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Continued To Aug-17-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer C. Marlowe for petitioner and surviving spouse Mariah S. Robinson, who was also present (via Zoom).
Nancy Lofdahl for objector and heir Walter Roberts (via Zoom).
Lillian E. Ng respondent and administrator Colleen S. O'Neal (via Zoom).

Discussion was held regarding the passing of the objector, that there is still some outstanding discovery to be conducted, and that the parties are to file an ex-parte application for an order increasing the bond.

The matter is continued to August 17, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Not reported.

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar May-11-2026 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204

Verified Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Mar-23-2026 Continued To May-11-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Jennifer C. Marlowe for petitioner and surviving spouse Mariah S. Robinson, who was also present (via Zoom).
Nancy Lofdahl for objector and heir Walter Roberts (via Zoom).
Lillian E. Ng respondent and administrator Colleen S. O'Neal (via Zoom).

Discussion was held that there is a ongoing probate matter in Florida, that the personal representative needs to get involved, and that Ms. Ng is requesting authorization to file an accounting that's over a 2 year period.

The Court granted the request to file an accounting from 2022 to 2025.

The matter is continued to May 11, 2026 at 9:00 a.m., in Dept. 204.

Judge: Michael McNaughton. Clerk: A. Datt. Deputy: Wu. Not reported.

Verified Petition To Determine Entitlement To Estate Distribution
Off Calendar Aug-27-2025 Continued To Jan-12-26 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 204
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Jennifer C. Marlowe for petitioner and surviving spouse Mariah S. Robinson, who was also present (via Zoom).
Nancy Lofdahl for objector and heir Walter Roberts (via Zoom).
Lillian E. Ng respondent and administrator Colleen S. O'Neal (via Zoom).

The matter came on calendar for hearing on the verified petition to determine entitlement to estate distribution and status on close of estate.

The Court stated raised concerns about the level of personal accusations presented in the filings and noted that issues of mental illness or criminal history do not bar inheritance or marriage under the Probate Code. The Court inquired whether the objector intended to contest the validity of the marriage within this proceeding. Ms. Lofdahl requested additional time to conduct discovery regarding the alleged marriage.

Ms. Marlowe did not object to the request for continuance. After discussing scheduling, the Court continued the matter to January 12, 2026.

Judge: Ross C. Moody; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
